description: Backend server starts and health check endpoint responds with 200 OK
steps: Step 1: Run init.sh to start the server
Step 2: Send GET request to /api/health
Step 3: Verify response status is 200
Step 4: Verify response contains status: 'ok'

description: Frontend application loads successfully in browser on configured port
steps: Step 1: Run init.sh to start both servers
Step 2: Navigate to frontend port in browser
Step 3: Verify page loads without errors
Step 4: Verify React app root element is present

description: SQLite database initializes with all required tables on first run
steps: Step 1: Start backend server for the first time
Step 2: Check database file is created
Step 3: Verify users table exists
Step 4: Verify conversations table exists
Step 5: Verify messages table exists
Step 6: Verify artifacts table exists
Step 7: Verify projects table exists

description: User can send a message and receive a streaming response from Claude API
steps: Step 1: Navigate to the chat interface
Step 2: Type a message in the input field
Step 3: Click the send button
Step 4: Verify user message appears in chat
Step 5: Verify typing indicator appears
Step 6: Verify response starts streaming in
Step 7: Verify full response is displayed when complete
Step 8: Verify typing indicator disappears after completion

description: Chat input field auto-resizes as user types multi-line text
steps: Step 1: Navigate to chat interface
Step 2: Click on the input textarea
Step 3: Type a single line of text and measure height
Step 4: Press Shift+Enter to add a new line
Step 5: Verify textarea height increases
Step 6: Continue adding lines and verify continued auto-expansion
Step 7: Verify there is a maximum height limit

description: Pressing Enter sends the message; Shift+Enter adds a new line
steps: Step 1: Navigate to chat interface
Step 2: Type a message in the input field
Step 3: Press Shift+Enter
Step 4: Verify a newline is added, message not sent
Step 5: Continue typing on new line
Step 6: Press Enter
Step 7: Verify message is sent

description: New conversation is created when user sends first message
steps: Step 1: Navigate to chat interface with no active conversation
Step 2: Type a message and send it
Step 3: Verify a new conversation is created in the sidebar
Step 4: Verify the conversation appears in the list

description: Conversation title is auto-generated from the first user message
steps: Step 1: Start a new conversation
Step 2: Send a distinctive first message
Step 3: Verify the conversation title in the sidebar reflects the message content
Step 4: Verify the title is not the raw message but a generated summary

description: Sidebar shows conversation list grouped by time period (Today, Yesterday, Previous 7 Days)
steps: Step 1: Create multiple conversations on different days
Step 2: Open the sidebar
Step 3: Verify 'Today' section shows today's conversations
Step 4: Verify 'Yesterday' section shows yesterday's conversations
Step 5: Verify 'Previous 7 Days' section shows older conversations

description: User can click a conversation in the sidebar to switch to it
steps: Step 1: Create two conversations with different messages
Step 2: Click on the second conversation in sidebar
Step 3: Verify chat area shows that conversation's messages
Step 4: Click on the first conversation
Step 5: Verify chat area switches to first conversation's messages

description: User can create a new conversation via the 'New Chat' button
steps: Step 1: Navigate to chat interface
Step 2: Click the 'New Chat' button
Step 3: Verify chat area clears and shows welcome/empty state
Step 4: Verify input is focused and ready for input

description: User can rename a conversation via right-click context menu or inline edit
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation
Step 2: Right-click on conversation in sidebar
Step 3: Select 'Rename' from context menu
Step 4: Clear the current title and type a new title
Step 5: Press Enter to confirm
Step 6: Verify the new title appears in the sidebar
Step 7: Verify the title persists after page refresh

description: User can delete a conversation with confirmation dialog
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation with messages
Step 2: Right-click on conversation in sidebar
Step 3: Select 'Delete' from context menu
Step 4: Verify confirmation dialog appears
Step 5: Click 'Delete' to confirm
Step 6: Verify conversation is removed from sidebar
Step 7: Verify conversation is gone after refresh

description: Stop generation button appears during streaming and halts response when clicked
steps: Step 1: Send a message that will generate a long response
Step 2: Verify stop button appears during streaming
Step 3: Click the stop button
Step 4: Verify streaming stops immediately
Step 5: Verify stop button disappears
Step 6: Verify send button reappears

description: Markdown is properly rendered in assistant messages (headers, bold, italic, lists)
steps: Step 1: Send a message requesting markdown-formatted response
Step 2: Verify H1, H2, H3 headers render with proper styling
Step 3: Verify **bold** text renders bold
Step 4: Verify *italic* text renders italic
Step 5: Verify unordered lists render with bullets
Step 6: Verify ordered lists render with numbers
Step 7: Verify blockquotes render with left border styling

description: Code blocks in messages have syntax highlighting and copy button
steps: Step 1: Send a message requesting code in a specific language (Python)
Step 2: Verify code block renders with a language label
Step 3: Verify syntax is highlighted with appropriate colors
Step 4: Verify copy button appears on hover/in header
Step 5: Click copy button
Step 6: Verify clipboard contains the code content

description: Inline code in messages renders with monospace font and background
steps: Step 1: Send a message that will include inline code
Step 2: Verify inline code renders with monospace font
Step 3: Verify inline code has a distinct background color
Step 4: Verify inline code is styled differently from surrounding text

description: Model selector allows switching between Claude models
steps: Step 1: Navigate to chat interface
Step 2: Find model selector dropdown
Step 3: Click on model selector
Step 4: Verify Claude Sonnet 4.5 option is present
Step 5: Verify Claude Haiku 4.5 option is present
Step 6: Verify Claude Opus 4.1 option is present
Step 7: Select a different model
Step 8: Verify selected model is shown in selector
Step 9: Send a message and verify it uses selected model

description: Model defaults to Claude Sonnet 4.5 for new conversations
steps: Step 1: Create a new conversation
Step 2: Check model selector value
Step 3: Verify it shows 'Claude Sonnet 4.5' as default

description: Artifacts are detected in Claude responses and displayed in side panel
steps: Step 1: Send a message asking Claude to create a code artifact
Step 2: Verify artifact panel slides in from the right
Step 3: Verify artifact has a title
Step 4: Verify artifact has a type badge (code, html, etc.)
Step 5: Verify artifact content is displayed
Step 6: Verify main chat still shows conversation

description: Code artifacts display with syntax highlighting in the artifact panel
steps: Step 1: Ask Claude to create a JavaScript code artifact
Step 2: Wait for artifact panel to appear
Step 3: Verify code is displayed with syntax highlighting
Step 4: Verify line numbers are shown
Step 5: Verify code is scrollable for long content

description: HTML artifacts render as live preview in artifact panel
steps: Step 1: Ask Claude to create an HTML webpage artifact
Step 2: Wait for artifact panel to appear
Step 3: Verify a preview tab shows rendered HTML
Step 4: Verify a code tab shows the raw HTML
Step 5: Switch between tabs and verify each works

description: Artifact panel can be closed and reopened
steps: Step 1: Generate an artifact to open the panel
Step 2: Click the close button on artifact panel
Step 3: Verify panel closes and chat area expands
Step 4: Click on artifact reference in chat
Step 5: Verify panel reopens showing the artifact

description: Artifact can be downloaded as a file
steps: Step 1: Generate an artifact
Step 2: Click the download button in artifact panel
Step 3: Verify a file download is triggered
Step 4: Verify downloaded file contains artifact content

description: Artifact can be viewed in full-screen mode
steps: Step 1: Generate an artifact
Step 2: Click the full-screen button in artifact panel
Step 3: Verify artifact expands to fill the viewport
Step 4: Press Escape or click exit to return to normal view
Step 5: Verify artifact panel returns to side panel size

description: Search conversations filters the sidebar list in real-time
steps: Step 1: Create multiple conversations with distinct titles
Step 2: Click on the search input in sidebar
Step 3: Type part of a conversation title
Step 4: Verify only matching conversations are shown
Step 5: Clear the search input
Step 6: Verify all conversations are shown again

description: Conversations can be pinned and appear at the top of the list
steps: Step 1: Create multiple conversations
Step 2: Right-click on a conversation
Step 3: Select 'Pin' from context menu
Step 4: Verify pinned conversation appears at top of list
Step 5: Verify pin icon is visible on pinned conversation
Step 6: Right-click and select 'Unpin'
Step 7: Verify conversation returns to normal position

description: Conversations can be archived and hidden from main list
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation
Step 2: Right-click and select 'Archive'
Step 3: Verify conversation disappears from main list
Step 4: Navigate to archive view
Step 5: Verify archived conversation appears there
Step 6: Unarchive the conversation
Step 7: Verify it returns to main list

description: Projects can be created with a name, description, and color
steps: Step 1: Navigate to projects section
Step 2: Click 'Create Project' button
Step 3: Enter project name
Step 4: Enter project description
Step 5: Select a color
Step 6: Click create
Step 7: Verify project appears in projects list
Step 8: Verify project has correct name, description, and color

description: Conversations can be moved to a project
steps: Step 1: Create a project
Step 2: Create a conversation
Step 3: Right-click the conversation
Step 4: Select 'Move to Project'
Step 5: Select the project
Step 6: Verify conversation is now under the project
Step 7: Verify project shows updated conversation count

description: Project-specific custom instructions are applied to conversations in the project
steps: Step 1: Create a project
Step 2: Open project settings
Step 3: Add custom instructions text
Step 4: Save settings
Step 5: Start a conversation within the project
Step 6: Send a message
Step 7: Verify response reflects the custom instructions

description: Global custom instructions are applied to all conversations
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Settings
Step 2: Find 'Custom Instructions' tab
Step 3: Enter global instructions
Step 4: Save
Step 5: Start a new conversation
Step 6: Send a message
Step 7: Verify response reflects the global custom instructions

description: Settings modal opens and has tabbed interface
steps: Step 1: Click settings icon/button
Step 2: Verify settings modal opens
Step 3: Verify tabs exist (Appearance, Custom Instructions, Models, etc.)
Step 4: Click each tab and verify content changes
Step 5: Close modal with X button or Escape key

description: Theme switching between Light, Dark, and Auto modes works
steps: Step 1: Open Settings
Step 2: Navigate to Appearance tab
Step 3: Select 'Dark' theme
Step 4: Verify UI switches to dark mode immediately
Step 5: Select 'Light' theme
Step 6: Verify UI switches to light mode
Step 7: Select 'Auto'
Step 8: Verify theme follows system preference
Step 9: Verify theme preference persists after page refresh

description: Font size can be adjusted in settings
steps: Step 1: Open Settings > Appearance
Step 2: Find font size control
Step 3: Increase font size
Step 4: Verify text in chat area increases in size
Step 5: Decrease font size
Step 6: Verify text decreases in size
Step 7: Verify font size preference is saved

description: Image can be uploaded and attached to a message
steps: Step 1: Navigate to chat interface
Step 2: Click the attachment/image button
Step 3: Select an image file
Step 4: Verify image preview appears in input area
Step 5: Type a message about the image
Step 6: Send the message
Step 7: Verify message shows the image
Step 8: Verify assistant responds with image context

description: Message can be edited by the user after sending
steps: Step 1: Send a message in a conversation
Step 2: Hover over the user message
Step 3: Click the edit button
Step 4: Modify the message text
Step 5: Confirm the edit
Step 6: Verify message shows updated content
Step 7: Verify assistant generates a new response to edited message

description: Assistant response can be regenerated
steps: Step 1: Send a message and receive a response
Step 2: Hover over the assistant message
Step 3: Click the 'Regenerate' button
Step 4: Verify previous response is replaced
Step 5: Verify new response streams in
Step 6: Verify conversation context is maintained

description: Conversation can be exported as JSON
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation with multiple messages
Step 2: Right-click conversation in sidebar
Step 3: Select 'Export'
Step 4: Select JSON format
Step 5: Verify JSON file is downloaded
Step 6: Verify JSON contains all messages with proper structure

description: Conversation can be exported as Markdown
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation with multiple messages
Step 2: Open export dialog
Step 3: Select Markdown format
Step 4: Verify Markdown file is downloaded
Step 5: Verify Markdown contains properly formatted messages

description: Conversation can be shared via a unique link
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation
Step 2: Click share button or use context menu
Step 3: Verify share dialog opens with a unique URL
Step 4: Copy the share link
Step 5: Open the share link in a new tab
Step 6: Verify conversation is viewable as read-only

description: Global search finds conversations across all chats
steps: Step 1: Create multiple conversations with distinct content
Step 2: Open global search (Cmd+K or search icon)
Step 3: Type a search term present in one conversation
Step 4: Verify matching conversations appear in results
Step 5: Click a result to navigate to that conversation

description: Command palette opens with Cmd+K and provides quick actions
steps: Step 1: Press Cmd+K (or Ctrl+K on Windows)
Step 2: Verify command palette overlay appears
Step 3: Type to search available commands
Step 4: Verify results filter based on input
Step 5: Select a command using keyboard
Step 6: Verify command is executed

description: Temperature control in advanced settings affects response creativity
steps: Step 1: Open advanced/model settings for a conversation
Step 2: Find temperature slider
Step 3: Verify slider range is 0 to 1
Step 4: Adjust temperature value
Step 5: Verify value is shown numerically
Step 6: Send a message and verify setting is passed to API

description: Max tokens setting limits response length
steps: Step 1: Open advanced settings
Step 2: Find max tokens control
Step 3: Set a low max token value
Step 4: Send a message asking for a long response
Step 5: Verify response is cut off at approximately the token limit

description: Token usage is displayed per message
steps: Step 1: Send a message and receive response
Step 2: Verify token count is displayed near the message
Step 3: Verify it shows input and output token counts
Step 4: Verify running total is updated

description: Conversation folders can be created and conversations organized within them
steps: Step 1: Open folder management
Step 2: Create a new folder with a name
Step 3: Drag a conversation into the folder
Step 4: Verify conversation appears under folder in sidebar
Step 5: Expand and collapse folder
Step 6: Verify conversations stay in folder after refresh

description: Duplicate conversation creates an exact copy with all messages
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation with several messages
Step 2: Right-click and select 'Duplicate'
Step 3: Verify a new conversation is created
Step 4: Verify all messages are copied
Step 5: Verify title includes 'Copy of' or similar indicator

description: Prompt library shows categorized prompt templates
steps: Step 1: Open prompt library (via sidebar or button)
Step 2: Verify categories are shown
Step 3: Verify prompt templates are displayed
Step 4: Click on a prompt template
Step 5: Verify it populates the input field

description: User can save custom prompts to the prompt library
steps: Step 1: Open prompt library
Step 2: Click 'Add new prompt'
Step 3: Enter title, description, and prompt text
Step 4: Select a category
Step 5: Save the prompt
Step 6: Verify prompt appears in the library

description: Usage tracking dashboard shows daily token usage
steps: Step 1: Navigate to usage/analytics section
Step 2: Verify daily usage chart/display is shown
Step 3: Verify token counts are shown per day
Step 4: Verify total usage for the day is displayed

description: API key management allows viewing and updating the API key
steps: Step 1: Open Settings
Step 2: Navigate to API settings tab
Step 3: Verify API key field is present (masked)
Step 4: Update the API key
Step 5: Save changes
Step 6: Verify the key is saved and used for subsequent requests

description: Multi-turn conversation maintains context across multiple exchanges
steps: Step 1: Start a new conversation
Step 2: Send message: 'My name is Alice'
Step 3: Verify assistant acknowledges
Step 4: Send message: 'What is my name?'
Step 5: Verify assistant responds with 'Alice'
Step 6: Continue with several more messages
Step 7: Verify context is maintained throughout

description: Messages load when switching to an existing conversation
steps: Step 1: Create two conversations with messages
Step 2: Switch to conversation A
Step 3: Verify messages load correctly
Step 4: Switch to conversation B
Step 5: Verify conversation B messages load
Step 6: Switch back to conversation A
Step 7: Verify messages are still there and correct

description: Scroll to bottom button appears when scrolled up in long conversation
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation with many messages
Step 2: Scroll up in the chat area
Step 3: Verify 'scroll to bottom' button appears
Step 4: Click the button
Step 5: Verify chat scrolls to bottom
Step 6: Verify button disappears when at bottom

description: Message copy button copies full message content to clipboard
steps: Step 1: Receive an assistant message
Step 2: Hover over the message
Step 3: Click the copy button
Step 4: Verify clipboard contains the message text
Step 5: Verify markdown formatting is included

description: Welcome screen shows for new/empty conversation with example prompts
steps: Step 1: Click 'New Chat' button
Step 2: Verify welcome screen or empty state appears
Step 3: Verify example prompts/suggestions are shown
Step 4: Click on an example prompt
Step 5: Verify it populates the input field

description: Mermaid diagram artifacts render as visual diagrams
steps: Step 1: Ask Claude to create a Mermaid diagram artifact
Step 2: Verify artifact panel opens
Step 3: Verify diagram is rendered visually (not as raw text)
Step 4: Verify diagram shows correct structure

description: SVG artifacts render as vector graphics in the artifact panel
steps: Step 1: Ask Claude to create an SVG artifact
Step 2: Verify artifact panel shows SVG rendered visually
Step 3: Verify SVG is displayed correctly without errors
Step 4: Verify it can be downloaded

description: Text/document artifacts display with proper formatting
steps: Step 1: Ask Claude to create a text document artifact
Step 2: Verify artifact panel shows document content
Step 3: Verify text is properly formatted and readable
Step 4: Verify document can be downloaded as a text file

description: Artifact versioning tracks changes and allows viewing previous versions
steps: Step 1: Generate an artifact
Step 2: Ask Claude to modify the artifact
Step 3: Verify new version is created
Step 4: Find version selector in artifact panel
Step 5: Switch to previous version
Step 6: Verify previous content is displayed

description: Projects can be deleted with all their conversations
steps: Step 1: Create a project with conversations
Step 2: Navigate to project settings
Step 3: Click 'Delete Project'
Step 4: Confirm deletion in dialog
Step 5: Verify project is removed
Step 6: Verify conversations are removed or moved

description: Projects can be renamed and have description updated
steps: Step 1: Create a project
Step 2: Open project settings
Step 3: Change project name
Step 4: Update description
Step 5: Save changes
Step 6: Verify updated name appears in project list

description: System prompt can be set per conversation
steps: Step 1: Open conversation settings
Step 2: Find system prompt field
Step 3: Enter a custom system prompt
Step 4: Save
Step 5: Send a message
Step 6: Verify response reflects the system prompt

description: Keyboard shortcuts reference guide is accessible
steps: Step 1: Open Settings or press ?
Step 2: Navigate to keyboard shortcuts section
Step 3: Verify list of shortcuts is displayed
Step 4: Verify shortcuts include common actions (New Chat, Search, etc.)

description: Authentication login/logout flow works
steps: Step 1: Navigate to the login page
Step 2: Enter credentials
Step 3: Click login
Step 4: Verify redirect to main chat interface
Step 5: Verify user profile is shown
Step 6: Click logout
Step 7: Verify redirect to login page

description: User profile information is displayed in the sidebar
steps: Step 1: Log in to the application
Step 2: Check sidebar bottom
Step 3: Verify user avatar/icon is shown
Step 4: Verify user name or email is displayed
Step 5: Click user profile to see options

description: Error state is shown when API request fails
steps: Step 1: Simulate API failure (or use invalid key)
Step 2: Send a message
Step 3: Verify error message is displayed to user
Step 4: Verify error is clearly distinguishable from normal messages
Step 5: Verify user can retry sending the message

description: Loading skeletons appear while conversation messages are loading
steps: Step 1: Click on a conversation with many messages
Step 2: Verify loading skeleton placeholders appear briefly
Step 3: Verify skeletons are replaced by actual messages
Step 4: Verify transition is smooth

description: Typing indicator animates while waiting for Claude response
steps: Step 1: Send a message
Step 2: Verify animated typing indicator appears
Step 3: Verify indicator shows three bouncing dots or similar
Step 4: Verify indicator disappears when response starts streaming
Step 5: Verify response streams in smoothly

description: Conversation search searches message content, not just titles
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation with specific content in messages
Step 2: Open search
Step 3: Search for text that appears in message body, not title
Step 4: Verify conversation appears in results
Step 5: Navigate to conversation and verify the message exists

description: Monthly usage dashboard shows cumulative usage statistics
steps: Step 1: Navigate to usage dashboard
Step 2: Switch to monthly view
Step 3: Verify monthly token totals are shown
Step 4: Verify breakdown by model is available
Step 5: Verify estimated cost is displayed

description: Conversations can be filtered by project in the sidebar
steps: Step 1: Create multiple projects with conversations
Step 2: Use project filter or selector
Step 3: Select a specific project
Step 4: Verify only conversations from that project are shown
Step 5: Select 'All' to show conversations from all projects

description: Conversation timestamps show relative time (e.g., '2 hours ago')
steps: Step 1: View conversation list in sidebar
Step 2: Verify timestamps show relative time
Step 3: Hover over timestamp
Step 4: Verify absolute date/time is shown as tooltip

description: React component artifacts can be previewed
steps: Step 1: Ask Claude to create a React component artifact
Step 2: Verify artifact panel shows the component
Step 3: Verify there is a preview tab showing rendered component
Step 4: Verify code tab shows the JSX code

description: Multiple artifacts in a conversation appear as tabs in the artifact panel
steps: Step 1: Ask Claude to create two different artifacts
Step 2: Verify both artifacts are accessible in the panel
Step 3: Verify tabs or navigation allows switching between them
Step 4: Click each tab and verify correct artifact is shown

description: Top-P (nucleus sampling) parameter can be adjusted in advanced settings
steps: Step 1: Open advanced settings
Step 2: Find top-p control
Step 3: Verify range is 0 to 1
Step 4: Adjust the value
Step 5: Verify value is displayed
Step 6: Verify setting is applied to next request

description: Share link expires and becomes invalid after set time
steps: Step 1: Share a conversation
Step 2: Set expiry time in share settings
Step 3: Verify expiry date is shown
Step 4: After expiry, verify the link returns 404 or expired message

description: Conversation branching creates alternate paths from a message
steps: Step 1: Have a multi-message conversation
Step 2: Find a message in the middle
Step 3: Use 'Branch from here' option
Step 4: Verify new conversation branch is created
Step 5: Verify branch contains messages up to that point
Step 6: Send new messages in the branch

description: Project knowledge base accepts document uploads
steps: Step 1: Open project settings
Step 2: Navigate to knowledge base section
Step 3: Upload a text document
Step 4: Verify document appears in knowledge base list
Step 5: Verify document content is accessible for conversations

description: Responsive layout collapses sidebar on mobile screens
steps: Step 1: Open app in desktop view
Step 2: Verify three-column layout (sidebar, chat, artifact)
Step 3: Resize browser to mobile width (< 768px)
Step 4: Verify sidebar collapses
Step 5: Verify hamburger menu or toggle appears
Step 6: Click toggle to show sidebar
Step 7: Verify sidebar appears as overlay or drawer

description: Accessibility: All interactive elements are keyboard navigable
steps: Step 1: Focus on the page using Tab key
Step 2: Navigate through all interactive elements
Step 3: Verify focus is visible on each element
Step 4: Verify buttons can be activated with Enter/Space
Step 5: Verify dropdowns can be navigated with arrow keys
Step 6: Verify modals trap focus when open

description: ARIA labels are present on all interactive elements
steps: Step 1: Inspect icon buttons in the interface
Step 2: Verify aria-label attributes are present
Step 3: Check input elements have associated labels
Step 4: Verify roles are set appropriately (button, navigation, etc.)

description: Character count is displayed in the message input field
steps: Step 1: Click on the message input
Step 2: Type a message
Step 3: Verify character count is displayed
Step 4: Verify count updates as user types
Step 5: Verify warning appears when approaching limit

description: LaTeX/math equations render properly in messages
steps: Step 1: Send message asking for mathematical formula
Step 2: Verify LaTeX expressions are rendered as visual math
Step 3: Verify inline math ($ ... $) renders inline
Step 4: Verify block math ($$ ... $$) renders as centered block

description: Conversation export includes timestamp and model information
steps: Step 1: Export a conversation
Step 2: Open the exported file
Step 3: Verify timestamps are included for each message
Step 4: Verify model name is included in export
Step 5: Verify conversation title is in the export

description: Settings are persisted across browser sessions
steps: Step 1: Change various settings (theme, font size, etc.)
Step 2: Close the browser
Step 3: Reopen the application
Step 4: Verify all settings are retained
Step 5: Verify theme is applied on load without flash

description: Message density setting changes the spacing in the chat area
steps: Step 1: Open Settings > Appearance
Step 2: Find message density option
Step 3: Select 'Compact'
Step 4: Verify messages are more tightly spaced
Step 5: Select 'Spacious'
Step 6: Verify messages have more padding/margin

description: Code theme selection changes the syntax highlighting theme
steps: Step 1: Open Settings
Step 2: Find code theme selector
Step 3: View available themes
Step 4: Select a different theme
Step 5: Verify code blocks use new theme colors

description: High contrast mode is available for accessibility
steps: Step 1: Open Settings > Accessibility
Step 2: Enable high contrast mode
Step 3: Verify interface has higher contrast colors
Step 4: Verify text remains readable
Step 5: Disable high contrast mode and verify return to normal

description: Reduced motion preference is respected
steps: Step 1: Enable reduced motion in OS settings
Step 2: Navigate to the application
Step 3: Verify animations are reduced or disabled
Step 4: Alternatively, find reduced motion toggle in settings

description: API endpoints return proper HTTP status codes and error messages
steps: Step 1: Send GET request to /api/conversations with invalid auth
Step 2: Verify 401 Unauthorized is returned
Step 3: Send GET request to /api/conversations/999999 (non-existent)
Step 4: Verify 404 Not Found is returned
Step 5: Send POST with invalid data
Step 6: Verify 400 Bad Request with error details

description: SSE streaming endpoint maintains connection and sends incremental updates
steps: Step 1: Send a message that triggers streaming
Step 2: Monitor network tab for SSE connection
Step 3: Verify event stream is opened
Step 4: Verify events arrive incrementally
Step 5: Verify connection closes on completion

description: Context menu appears on right-click for conversations in sidebar
steps: Step 1: Right-click on a conversation in sidebar
Step 2: Verify context menu appears at cursor position
Step 3: Verify menu contains: Rename, Pin, Archive, Delete, Export, Share
Step 4: Click outside menu to dismiss
Step 5: Verify menu closes

description: New message in active conversation auto-scrolls to bottom
steps: Step 1: Open a conversation
Step 2: Scroll to top of message history
Step 3: Send a new message
Step 4: Verify view auto-scrolls to show new message at bottom
Step 5: Verify this happens even for long streaming responses

description: Conversation title can be edited inline by clicking on it
steps: Step 1: Open a conversation
Step 2: Click on the conversation title in the header
Step 3: Verify title becomes editable inline
Step 4: Type a new title
Step 5: Press Enter to save
Step 6: Verify title updates in both header and sidebar

description: Search can filter conversations by date range
steps: Step 1: Open search or filter panel
Step 2: Find date range filter
Step 3: Set start and end dates
Step 4: Verify only conversations within that range appear
Step 5: Clear filter and verify all conversations return

description: Search can filter conversations by model used
steps: Step 1: Create conversations with different models
Step 2: Open search with model filter
Step 3: Filter by Claude Sonnet
Step 4: Verify only Sonnet conversations appear
Step 5: Filter by Claude Haiku
Step 6: Verify only Haiku conversations appear

description: Draft messages are auto-saved when navigating away
steps: Step 1: Start typing a message in input field
Step 2: Click on a different conversation
Step 3: Navigate back to original conversation
Step 4: Verify typed message is restored in input field

description: Example prompts on welcome screen are clickable and populate input
steps: Step 1: Start a new conversation
Step 2: View welcome screen example prompts
Step 3: Click one of the example prompts
Step 4: Verify input field is populated with the prompt
Step 5: Optionally send the prompt and verify it works

description: Prompt library prompts can be deleted
steps: Step 1: Open prompt library
Step 2: View a saved prompt
Step 3: Click delete/remove button
Step 4: Confirm deletion
Step 5: Verify prompt is removed from library

description: Usage tracking shows per-conversation token statistics
steps: Step 1: Open a conversation
Step 2: Find conversation statistics or info panel
Step 3: Verify total input tokens for conversation
Step 4: Verify total output tokens
Step 5: Verify message count is shown

description: Image attachments are properly sent to Claude API with vision capability
steps: Step 1: Attach an image to a message
Step 2: Ask a question about the image
Step 3: Send the message
Step 4: Verify Claude responds with image-aware content
Step 5: Verify image is stored and visible in conversation history

description: Multiple images can be attached to a single message
steps: Step 1: Click attachment button
Step 2: Select first image
Step 3: Click attachment button again
Step 4: Select second image
Step 5: Verify both images appear as previews
Step 6: Send message with both images
Step 7: Verify both images are shown in the sent message

description: Sidebar can be resized by dragging the handle
steps: Step 1: Find the resize handle between sidebar and chat area
Step 2: Click and drag to make sidebar wider
Step 3: Verify sidebar width changes
Step 4: Drag to make sidebar narrower
Step 5: Verify sidebar narrows but doesn't collapse below minimum

description: Project analytics shows usage stats per project
steps: Step 1: Navigate to a project
Step 2: Open project settings or analytics
Step 3: Verify conversation count is shown
Step 4: Verify message count is shown
Step 5: Verify total tokens used is displayed

description: Model comparison view shows side-by-side model information
steps: Step 1: Open model selector
Step 2: Find model comparison or info view
Step 3: Verify capabilities for each model are shown
Step 4: Verify context window sizes are displayed
Step 5: Verify pricing information is shown

description: Conversation can be pinned from within the chat view
steps: Step 1: Open a conversation
Step 2: Find pin button in conversation header
Step 3: Click pin button
Step 4: Verify conversation moves to top of sidebar list
Step 5: Click again to unpin

description: Number of conversations in a folder is shown on folder icon
steps: Step 1: Create a folder
Step 2: Add multiple conversations to the folder
Step 3: View folder in sidebar
Step 4: Verify count badge shows number of conversations

description: Voice input button (mock UI) is present in the input area
steps: Step 1: Navigate to chat interface
Step 2: View the input area
Step 3: Verify microphone icon button is present
Step 4: Click the button and verify it shows as active or provides feedback

description: Messages with tables render HTML tables properly
steps: Step 1: Request a response with a table from Claude
Step 2: Verify table renders with proper border/cell structure
Step 3: Verify table headers are bold or distinct
Step 4: Verify table rows alternate or are clearly delineated

description: Response suggestions appear after assistant messages
steps: Step 1: Receive an assistant response
Step 2: Verify suggested follow-up questions appear
Step 3: Click on a suggestion
Step 4: Verify it populates the input field or sends directly

description: Thinking/reasoning mode toggle is available for capable models
steps: Step 1: Select Claude Opus model
Step 2: Find thinking/reasoning mode toggle in settings
Step 3: Enable it
Step 4: Send a complex reasoning question
Step 5: Verify response includes thinking trace or extended reasoning

description: Quick actions menu provides shortcuts to common tasks
steps: Step 1: Find quick actions button or keyboard shortcut
Step 2: Open quick actions menu
Step 3: Verify actions like 'New Chat', 'Search', 'Export' are available
Step 4: Click an action and verify it executes

description: Conversation can be undeleted within a grace period (soft delete)
steps: Step 1: Delete a conversation
Step 2: Look for undo or recover option
Step 3: Click to recover
Step 4: Verify conversation is restored with all messages

description: Main chat layout has three-column structure (sidebar, chat, artifact panel) on desktop
steps: Step 1: Open app on desktop (1280px+ width)
Step 2: Take screenshot of main layout
Step 3: Verify sidebar is on the left
Step 4: Verify chat area is in the center
Step 5: Verify artifact panel is on the right when artifact exists

description: Color palette matches Claude.ai design: orange/amber accent, dark/light backgrounds
steps: Step 1: Take screenshot of the main interface
Step 2: Verify primary accent color is orange/amber (#CC785C range)
Step 3: Verify dark mode background is dark gray (~#1A1A1A)
Step 4: Verify light mode background is white or very light
Step 5: Verify borders are appropriately styled

description: User messages are right-aligned with subtle background
steps: Step 1: Send a message
Step 2: Take screenshot of chat area
Step 3: Verify user message appears on right side
Step 4: Verify user message has background color
Step 5: Verify user message bubble has rounded corners

description: Assistant messages are left-aligned with no background
steps: Step 1: Receive an assistant response
Step 2: Take screenshot of chat area
Step 3: Verify assistant message appears on left side
Step 4: Verify assistant message has no or minimal background
Step 5: Verify Claude avatar/icon appears before message

description: Typography uses system font stack with correct weights and sizes
steps: Step 1: Inspect font family in developer tools
Step 2: Verify Inter, SF Pro, or system-ui font stack is used
Step 3: Verify body text is font-normal with comfortable line height
Step 4: Verify headings use font-semibold
Step 5: Verify code uses monospace font (JetBrains Mono, Consolas, etc.)

description: Sidebar has proper visual design with dark/light mode support
steps: Step 1: Take screenshot in light mode
Step 2: Verify sidebar background is slightly different from main content
Step 3: Switch to dark mode
Step 4: Verify sidebar background adjusts properly
Step 5: Verify text contrast is maintained in both modes

description: New Chat button is prominent and easily identifiable in sidebar
steps: Step 1: View sidebar
Step 2: Identify New Chat button
Step 3: Verify button has primary styling (accent color or distinct border)
Step 4: Verify button text is clearly readable
Step 5: Verify button has proper padding and spacing

description: Code blocks have distinct visual styling with language label
steps: Step 1: Get a response with code blocks
Step 2: Take screenshot of code blocks
Step 3: Verify code block has distinct background color
Step 4: Verify language label appears in top-left or top-right
Step 5: Verify copy button is visible in top-right corner
Step 6: Verify code uses monospace font

description: Input area has clean, centered design with rounded border
steps: Step 1: View input area at bottom of chat
Step 2: Verify textarea has rounded corners
Step 3: Verify border is subtle but visible
Step 4: Verify focus state shows clear focus ring
Step 5: Verify input has proper internal padding

description: Send button has proper styling with loading/disabled state
steps: Step 1: View send button in input area
Step 2: Verify button has accent color or icon
Step 3: Verify disabled state when input is empty (grayed out)
Step 4: Verify loading state during message send
Step 5: Verify button returns to normal state after send

description: Typing indicator has smooth animation
steps: Step 1: Send a message and watch typing indicator
Step 2: Verify three dots or similar indicator appears
Step 3: Verify dots animate smoothly (bouncing, pulsing, etc.)
Step 4: Verify animation is not too distracting
Step 5: Verify indicator disappears smoothly

description: Settings modal has tabbed interface with clean visual design
steps: Step 1: Open Settings modal
Step 2: Take screenshot of modal
Step 3: Verify modal has proper border/shadow to distinguish from background
Step 4: Verify tabs are clearly labeled and styled
Step 5: Verify active tab has distinct visual indicator
Step 6: Verify modal has proper padding and spacing

description: Artifact panel has header with type badge and action buttons
steps: Step 1: Generate an artifact to open panel
Step 2: View artifact panel header
Step 3: Verify artifact title is displayed
Step 4: Verify type badge (CODE, HTML, etc.) is styled distinctly
Step 5: Verify action buttons (download, fullscreen, close) are present
Step 6: Verify buttons have proper hover states

description: Conversation list items have hover state and active state styling
steps: Step 1: View conversation list
Step 2: Hover over a conversation
Step 3: Verify hover state shows visual change
Step 4: Click on the active conversation
Step 5: Verify active state has distinct background or border

description: Welcome/empty state has centered, visually appealing design
steps: Step 1: Create a new chat (empty state)
Step 2: Take screenshot
Step 3: Verify Claude logo or branding is displayed
Step 4: Verify welcome text is prominent
Step 5: Verify example prompts are displayed in cards or buttons
Step 6: Verify layout is centered and balanced

description: Model selector badge shows current model name with proper styling
steps: Step 1: View model selector in conversation header
Step 2: Verify current model name is displayed
Step 3: Verify it has badge or dropdown indicator styling
Step 4: Verify it's clickable to open model selection

description: Error messages have appropriate red/warning styling
steps: Step 1: Trigger an error state
Step 2: Verify error message has red or warning color
Step 3: Verify error icon is present
Step 4: Verify error message is clearly readable and actionable

description: Dark mode applies consistent theming across all components
steps: Step 1: Switch to dark mode
Step 2: Take full-page screenshots
Step 3: Verify sidebar is dark
Step 4: Verify chat area is dark
Step 5: Verify modals are dark
Step 6: Verify input fields are dark
Step 7: Verify no white flash or inconsistent areas

description: Transitions and animations are smooth (150-300ms)
steps: Step 1: Open a dropdown
Step 2: Verify it fades/slides in smoothly
Step 3: Open sidebar on mobile
Step 4: Verify slide animation is smooth
Step 5: Open a modal
Step 6: Verify fade-in animation is present

description: Conversation header shows title and model selector in clean layout
steps: Step 1: Open any conversation
Step 2: View the header area
Step 3: Verify conversation title is prominently displayed
Step 4: Verify model selector is visible
Step 5: Verify header has appropriate spacing and alignment

description: Message action buttons (copy, edit, regenerate) appear cleanly on hover
steps: Step 1: Hover over a user message
Step 2: Verify action buttons appear
Step 3: Verify buttons are small icons, not text-heavy
Step 4: Verify buttons have tooltip labels
Step 5: Move mouse away and verify buttons hide

description: Skeleton loaders match the shape of content they're loading
steps: Step 1: Navigate to a conversation
Step 2: Observe loading state
Step 3: Verify skeleton loaders appear
Step 4: Verify skeletons have correct aspect ratio for messages
Step 5: Verify skeletons have pulsing animation

description: Mobile layout shows full-screen chat with hamburger menu
steps: Step 1: Set viewport to 375px width
Step 2: Take screenshot
Step 3: Verify chat takes full width
Step 4: Verify hamburger menu icon is visible in header
Step 5: Tap hamburger to verify sidebar slides in as overlay

description: Tabs in artifact panel are properly styled with active indicator
steps: Step 1: Generate multiple artifacts
Step 2: View artifact tabs
Step 3: Verify inactive tabs have muted styling
Step 4: Verify active tab has border-bottom or background change
Step 5: Verify tab text is truncated for long titles

description: Cards in settings and prompt library have consistent styling
steps: Step 1: Open prompt library
Step 2: View prompt cards
Step 3: Verify cards have subtle border or shadow
Step 4: Verify cards have rounded corners (8px)
Step 5: Verify consistent padding inside cards

description: Search input in sidebar has proper icon and styling
steps: Step 1: View search input in sidebar
Step 2: Verify magnifying glass icon is present
Step 3: Verify input has rounded styling
Step 4: Verify placeholder text is visible
Step 5: Verify clear button appears when text is entered

description: Project color selector shows color swatches clearly
steps: Step 1: Open project creation or settings
Step 2: Find color selector
Step 3: Verify multiple color options are shown as swatches
Step 4: Verify selected color has indicator (checkmark, border)
Step 5: Verify project uses selected color in UI

description: Dropdown menus have proper visual hierarchy and icons
steps: Step 1: Open model selector dropdown
Step 2: Verify dropdown has clean background
Step 3: Verify items have proper padding
Step 4: Verify active/selected item is highlighted
Step 5: Verify dropdown has shadow/border to elevate above content

description: Footer/user area in sidebar has clean profile display
steps: Step 1: View bottom of sidebar
Step 2: Verify user avatar/icon is displayed
Step 3: Verify user name is shown
Step 4: Verify settings gear icon is present
Step 5: Verify area is separated from conversation list visually

description: Command palette overlay has clean, centered, searchable design
steps: Step 1: Open command palette with Cmd+K
Step 2: Verify overlay appears over rest of UI
Step 3: Verify search input is focused and prominent
Step 4: Verify results list below is cleanly styled
Step 5: Verify backdrop blur or dimming of content behind

description: Time group labels in conversation list are properly styled
steps: Step 1: View conversation list with multiple time groups
Step 2: Verify 'Today', 'Yesterday' labels are distinct from conversation items
Step 3: Verify labels are smaller or muted compared to conversation titles
Step 4: Verify spacing between groups is adequate

description: Pin icon is visible and well-positioned on pinned conversations
steps: Step 1: Pin a conversation
Step 2: View it in sidebar
Step 3: Verify pin icon is visible
Step 4: Verify pin icon doesn't overlap conversation title
Step 5: Verify icon is appropriately sized

description: Toast/notification messages appear and dismiss gracefully
steps: Step 1: Perform an action that triggers a toast (save, copy, etc.)
Step 2: Verify toast appears at edge of screen
Step 3: Verify toast has appropriate color for action type
Step 4: Verify toast auto-dismisses after a few seconds
Step 5: Verify dismiss animation is smooth

description: Artifact panel slides in with animation when artifact is generated
steps: Step 1: Start from state with no artifact panel
Step 2: Ask Claude to generate an artifact
Step 3: Verify artifact panel slides in from right
Step 4: Verify animation is smooth (not jarring)
Step 5: Verify chat area adjusts its width smoothly

description: Focus states are clearly visible for keyboard navigation
steps: Step 1: Tab through interface elements
Step 2: Verify each focused element has visible focus ring
Step 3: Verify focus ring is not just browser default (custom styling)
Step 4: Verify focus ring doesn't obscure adjacent elements

description: Placeholder text in input field is properly styled and informative
steps: Step 1: View empty message input field
Step 2: Verify placeholder text is visible and readable
Step 3: Verify placeholder uses gray/muted color
Step 4: Verify placeholder text is helpful (e.g., 'Message Claude...')

description: Image preview in message shows thumbnail with proper sizing
steps: Step 1: Attach an image to a message
Step 2: View image preview in input area
Step 3: Verify image is shown as thumbnail (not full size)
Step 4: Verify remove button is visible on image preview
Step 5: After sending, verify image in message has appropriate max-height

description: Loading spinner appears when fetching data
steps: Step 1: Perform actions that require data loading
Step 2: Verify loading spinner is shown
Step 3: Verify spinner animation is smooth
Step 4: Verify spinner disappears when data loads
Step 5: Verify spinner is centered or appropriately positioned

description: Long conversation titles are truncated with ellipsis in sidebar
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation with a very long title
Step 2: View in sidebar
Step 3: Verify title is truncated with '...'
Step 4: Verify full title shows on hover as tooltip

description: The overall UI layout matches Claude.ai aesthetic and feel
steps: Step 1: Take full page screenshot
Step 2: Compare sidebar layout with Claude.ai reference
Step 3: Compare chat area message layout
Step 4: Compare color scheme overall
Step 5: Verify spacing and proportions feel similar
Step 6: Verify professional, clean appearance throughout

description: Backend CORS is configured to allow frontend origin
steps: Step 1: Start both frontend and backend servers
Step 2: Open browser console on frontend
Step 3: Make a request to the backend API
Step 4: Verify no CORS errors appear in console
Step 5: Verify response is received successfully

description: Database migrations run automatically on server startup
steps: Step 1: Delete the database file
Step 2: Start the server
Step 3: Verify database file is recreated
Step 4: Verify all tables are created with correct schema
Step 5: Verify server starts without errors

description: API key is read from /tmp/api-key file for Claude API calls
steps: Step 1: Ensure /tmp/api-key file exists
Step 2: Start the server
Step 3: Send a message in the chat
Step 4: Verify server reads the API key from file
Step 5: Verify Claude API call succeeds with the key

description: Conversation message count updates in database after each message
steps: Step 1: Create a new conversation
Step 2: Send a message
Step 3: Query database for conversation's message_count
Step 4: Verify count is 2 (user + assistant)
Step 5: Send another message
Step 6: Verify count increases to 4

description: Token count for messages is stored in the database
steps: Step 1: Send a message and receive response
Step 2: Query database messages table
Step 3: Verify tokens field is populated for both messages
Step 4: Verify input tokens are tracked for user message
Step 5: Verify output tokens are tracked for assistant message

description: Artifacts table records all generated artifacts with proper fields
steps: Step 1: Trigger artifact generation
Step 2: Query database artifacts table
Step 3: Verify artifact record has correct type, title, content
Step 4: Verify message_id foreign key is set
Step 5: Verify conversation_id is set
Step 6: Verify created_at timestamp is set

description: Shared conversation view page renders without authentication
steps: Step 1: Share a conversation to get share token
Step 2: Open share URL in incognito browser
Step 3: Verify conversation is viewable
Step 4: Verify it shows as read-only
Step 5: Verify no login is required

description: Onboarding flow shows for first-time users
steps: Step 1: Clear all local storage/cookies
Step 2: Navigate to the application
Step 3: Verify onboarding or welcome screen appears
Step 4: Go through the steps
Step 5: Verify onboarding marks as complete
Step 6: Refresh and verify onboarding doesn't repeat

description: Feature tour highlights key UI elements
steps: Step 1: Start feature tour from onboarding or help menu
Step 2: Verify tour highlights sidebar
Step 3: Verify tour explains model selector
Step 4: Verify tour shows artifact panel area
Step 5: Verify tour can be skipped at any point
Step 6: Verify tour completes gracefully

description: Privacy settings allow controlling data retention preferences
steps: Step 1: Open Settings > Privacy
Step 2: Verify privacy settings are shown
Step 3: Toggle auto-save conversations option
Step 4: Verify setting is saved
Step 5: Verify behavior changes accordingly

description: Language preferences can be set in settings
steps: Step 1: Open Settings
Step 2: Find language preference
Step 3: Verify available language options
Step 4: Select a language
Step 5: Verify UI labels update if multiple languages supported

description: Custom instruction templates allow saving and reusing instruction sets
steps: Step 1: Open custom instructions settings
Step 2: Create a new instruction template
Step 3: Name and save the template
Step 4: Apply the template to a conversation
Step 5: Verify template instructions are applied

description: Project templates allow starting projects with predefined settings
steps: Step 1: Create a new project
Step 2: Look for template option
Step 3: Select a project template
Step 4: Verify project is created with template settings
Step 5: Verify template custom instructions are pre-populated

description: Full-text search indexes messages for fast retrieval
steps: Step 1: Create conversations with various content
Step 2: Search for a specific word in message content
Step 3: Verify results appear quickly
Step 4: Verify correct conversations are found
Step 5: Verify search is case-insensitive

description: Conversation can be duplicated within a project
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation in a project
Step 2: Duplicate the conversation
Step 3: Verify duplicate is in same project
Step 4: Verify duplicate has all messages
Step 5: Verify duplicate gets a new distinct ID

description: API endpoint for Claude chat proxies requests with proper headers
steps: Step 1: POST to /api/claude/chat with message data
Step 2: Verify request is forwarded to Claude API
Step 3: Verify API key is properly set in Authorization header
Step 4: Verify response is returned to client

description: Streaming endpoint sends proper SSE format events
steps: Step 1: Connect to /api/claude/chat/stream
Step 2: Verify Content-Type is text/event-stream
Step 3: Verify events are in SSE format (data: {...}\n\n)
Step 4: Verify done event is sent at end
Step 5: Verify connection closes properly

description: Input area shows formatting toolbar with markdown shortcuts
steps: Step 1: View input area
Step 2: Verify toolbar is present (or accessible)
Step 3: Verify bold, italic, code buttons exist
Step 4: Select text and click bold
Step 5: Verify **text** markdown is inserted

description: File upload validates image type and size before sending
steps: Step 1: Attempt to upload a non-image file
Step 2: Verify error message about file type
Step 3: Attempt to upload an oversized image
Step 4: Verify error message about file size
Step 5: Upload a valid image
Step 6: Verify it uploads successfully

description: Conversation list can be sorted by different criteria
steps: Step 1: View conversation list
Step 2: Find sort options
Step 3: Sort by date created
Step 4: Verify order changes accordingly
Step 5: Sort by last updated
Step 6: Verify order reflects last message time

description: Batch operations allow selecting and deleting multiple conversations
steps: Step 1: Find multi-select mode for conversations
Step 2: Select multiple conversations
Step 3: Click batch delete
Step 4: Confirm deletion
Step 5: Verify all selected conversations are removed

description: Conversation search highlights matching terms in results
steps: Step 1: Search for a term
Step 2: View search results
Step 3: Verify matching term is highlighted in result snippet
Step 4: Verify highlight uses distinct color or bold styling

description: Model-specific context window is displayed in model info
steps: Step 1: Open model selector
Step 2: View model information for each model
Step 3: Verify context window size is displayed
Step 4: Verify it shows correct values for each model

description: Conversation token count approaches warning threshold notification
steps: Step 1: Create a very long conversation
Step 2: Monitor conversation token usage
Step 3: Verify warning appears as context window limit approaches
Step 4: Verify warning shows remaining tokens

description: Messages support hyperlinks that open in new tab
steps: Step 1: Ask Claude to include URLs in response
Step 2: Verify links are rendered as clickable hyperlinks
Step 3: Click a link
Step 4: Verify link opens in a new browser tab

description: Application handles network interruption gracefully
steps: Step 1: Start sending a message
Step 2: Simulate network disconnect
Step 3: Verify user-friendly error message is shown
Step 4: Restore network connection
Step 5: Verify application recovers
Step 6: Verify unsaved draft is preserved

description: App handles conversation list with 100+ conversations without performance issues
steps: Step 1: Create or mock 100+ conversations
Step 2: Load the application
Step 3: Verify sidebar loads conversations without freezing
Step 4: Scroll through list without lag
Step 5: Verify search still works quickly with large list

description: Artifact panel supports scrolling for long code artifacts
steps: Step 1: Generate a long code artifact (500+ lines)
Step 2: View in artifact panel
Step 3: Verify panel is scrollable vertically
Step 4: Verify line numbers stay aligned while scrolling
Step 5: Verify horizontal scrolling works for long lines

description: Conversation export to PDF creates readable document
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation with messages and code
Step 2: Select PDF export option
Step 3: Verify PDF is generated
Step 4: Open PDF and verify messages are readable
Step 5: Verify code blocks are formatted in PDF

description: Settings modal closes when clicking outside it (backdrop click)
steps: Step 1: Open Settings modal
Step 2: Click on the backdrop/overlay outside the modal
Step 3: Verify modal closes
Step 4: Reopen modal
Step 5: Press Escape key
Step 6: Verify modal closes

description: Backend rate limiting prevents API abuse
steps: Step 1: Send many rapid requests to Claude API
Step 2: Verify rate limiting kicks in
Step 3: Verify 429 Too Many Requests is returned
Step 4: Verify user sees appropriate error message

description: Input validation prevents XSS in user messages
steps: Step 1: Type a message with XSS payload (<script>alert('xss')</script>)
Step 2: Send the message
Step 3: Verify message is displayed as text, not executed as script
Step 4: Verify no alert dialog appears

description: Image upload to server stores file securely and returns URL
steps: Step 1: Upload an image via the attachment button
Step 2: Verify POST to /api/claude/images/upload
Step 3: Verify server stores file in appropriate location
Step 4: Verify response contains URL to access image
Step 5: Access the URL and verify image loads

description: Shared conversation view shows proper read-only state
steps: Step 1: Access a shared conversation via share token
Step 2: Verify conversation messages are displayed
Step 3: Verify no input field for sending messages
Step 4: Verify no edit or delete buttons
Step 5: Verify 'Read-only shared view' indicator is present

description: Keyboard shortcut for new chat (Ctrl/Cmd+N) works
steps: Step 1: Press Cmd+N (or Ctrl+N) from any screen
Step 2: Verify new chat is initiated
Step 3: Verify focus moves to message input

description: Context menu positions correctly near screen edges
steps: Step 1: Right-click on a conversation at the bottom of the sidebar
Step 2: Verify context menu appears fully visible (not clipped)
Step 3: Right-click on conversation near right edge
Step 4: Verify context menu stays within viewport

description: Previous artifact versions can be compared with current version
steps: Step 1: Generate an artifact and iterate on it
Step 2: Select a previous version
Step 3: Find compare or diff view option
Step 4: Verify changes between versions are highlighted

description: Link text in messages is styled distinctly (underline or color)
steps: Step 1: Receive a response with URLs
Step 2: Verify links have distinct color (blue or accent color)
Step 3: Verify links have underline or hover underline
Step 4: Verify visited links have distinct styling

description: Blockquote in messages has left border and indentation
steps: Step 1: Request a response with blockquote
Step 2: Verify blockquote has left border
Step 3: Verify blockquote text is indented
Step 4: Verify blockquote text is slightly different color or style

description: Tables in messages are styled with proper borders and alternating rows
steps: Step 1: Request a response with a table
Step 2: Verify table has border around cells
Step 3: Verify header row is bold or distinct
Step 4: Verify rows have alternating background colors
Step 5: Verify table is horizontally scrollable on mobile

description: Horizontal rule in messages is visually clean
steps: Step 1: Request response with a horizontal rule
Step 2: Verify HR renders as subtle dividing line

description: Numbered and bulleted lists have proper indentation and spacing
steps: Step 1: Request response with nested lists
Step 2: Verify list items have proper bullet/number display
Step 3: Verify nested lists are properly indented
Step 4: Verify list item spacing is comfortable to read

description: Project selector in sidebar has clean dropdown styling
steps: Step 1: Find project selector in sidebar
Step 2: Click to open dropdown
Step 3: Verify each project shows with its color
Step 4: Verify selected project is highlighted
Step 5: Verify dropdown closes when selection is made

description: Model capabilities display shows icons or badges clearly
steps: Step 1: Open model information or comparison view
Step 2: Verify capability icons/badges are present
Step 3: Verify capabilities like Vision, Coding, Analysis are indicated
Step 4: Verify styling is consistent across models

description: Full-screen artifact view has clean, minimal chrome

Step 2: Verify most of viewport is occupied by artifact content
Step 3: Verify minimal toolbar or controls are visible
Step 4: Verify exit button is clearly visible
Step 5: Verify background is appropriate for artifact type

description: Usage tracking dashboard has clean chart visualizations
steps: Step 1: Navigate to usage dashboard
Step 2: Verify charts are cleanly rendered
Step 3: Verify charts have labels and axes
Step 4: Verify color coding is used meaningfully
Step 5: Verify responsive layout on smaller screens

description: Context menu items have hover states and proper icons

Step 2: Hover over menu items

Step 4: Verify each item has appropriate icon on left
Step 5: Verify destructive actions (delete) are styled in red

description: Share dialog shows clean URL display with copy button

Step 2: View share dialog

Step 6: Verify dialog has appropriate visual design

description: Export options dialog has organized format selection
steps: Step 1: Open export dialog for a conversation

Step 3: Verify icons or visual indicators for each format
Step 4: Verify selected format is highlighted
Step 5: Verify export button is prominent

description: Prompt library modal has category sidebar and prompt cards
steps: Step 1: Open prompt library
Step 2: Verify categories are listed on the left or as tabs
Step 3: Verify prompts appear as cards on the right
Step 4: Verify cards show title and description preview
Step 5: Verify card has 'Use' button or is clickable

description: Project settings panel has organized sections with clear labels
steps: Step 1: Open project settings
Step 2: Verify sections are clearly labeled (General, Instructions, Knowledge, etc.)
Step 3: Verify settings are organized logically
Step 4: Verify form inputs have proper labels and help text

description: Keyboard shortcuts panel shows two-column layout with readable formatting
steps: Step 1: Open keyboard shortcuts reference
Step 2: Verify shortcuts are in two columns (action, shortcut)
Step 3: Verify keyboard keys are visually distinct (kbd styling)
Step 4: Verify shortcuts are grouped by category

description: Gradient or subtle visual interest is used appropriately in UI
steps: Step 1: View the main interface
Step 2: Verify appropriate use of subtle gradients
Step 3: Verify gradients enhance rather than distract
Step 4: Verify consistent use throughout the UI

description: Backend serves a PWA manifest file for progressive web app support
steps: Step 1: Navigate to frontend URL/manifest.json
Step 2: Verify manifest file exists
Step 3: Verify manifest contains app name, icons, and display settings

description: Touch gestures work on mobile for sidebar navigation
steps: Step 1: Access app on mobile device or simulated mobile
Step 2: Swipe right from left edge to open sidebar
Step 3: Verify sidebar slides open
Step 4: Swipe left to close sidebar
Step 5: Verify sidebar closes

description: Conversation message history is paginated for long conversations
steps: Step 1: Create a conversation with 50+ messages
Step 2: Open the conversation
Step 3: Verify initial load shows most recent messages
Step 4: Scroll to top to trigger loading older messages
Step 5: Verify older messages load without full page reload

description: Conversation can have multiple system messages in different positions
steps: Step 1: Send messages with a specific system prompt
Step 2: Change system prompt mid-conversation
Step 3: Verify conversation continues with new system prompt
Step 4: Verify previous messages are preserved

description: Project conversations endpoint returns only conversations for that project
steps: Step 1: Create two projects with different conversations
Step 2: GET /api/projects/:id/conversations for project 1
Step 3: Verify only project 1's conversations are returned
Step 4: GET conversations for project 2
Step 5: Verify only project 2's conversations are returned

description: API returns consistent JSON structure for all list endpoints
steps: Step 1: GET /api/conversations
Step 2: Verify response is JSON array
Step 3: Verify each item has id, title, created_at fields
Step 4: GET /api/projects
Step 5: Verify similar consistent structure

description: User can close the artifact panel to get more chat space
steps: Step 1: Open an artifact panel
Step 2: Click close button on the panel
Step 3: Verify panel closes
Step 4: Verify chat area expands to fill the space
Step 5: Verify the artifact link in chat still shows the artifact was created

description: Artifact re-prompt functionality sends follow-up to Claude with artifact context
steps: Step 1: Generate an artifact
Step 2: Click 'Re-prompt' or edit button in artifact panel
Step 3: Enter instructions for modifying the artifact
Step 4: Submit
Step 5: Verify Claude responds with updated artifact
Step 6: Verify new version is created in artifact history

description: Artifact type badge uses distinct color coding for different types
steps: Step 1: Generate code artifact
Step 2: Verify code type has one color badge
Step 3: Generate HTML artifact
Step 4: Verify HTML type has different color badge
Step 5: Verify colors are meaningful and consistent

description: Welcome screen has Claude branding and clean centered layout
steps: Step 1: Open new chat
Step 2: Take screenshot of welcome/empty state
Step 3: Verify Claude logo or text is centered
Step 4: Verify subtitle text is informative
Step 5: Verify example prompt cards are arranged neatly
Step 6: Verify overall design is inviting and professional

description: Auto-scroll behavior can be overridden when user scrolls up manually
steps: Step 1: Start receiving a streaming response
Step 2: While streaming, manually scroll up
Step 3: Verify auto-scroll stops (user is in control)
Step 4: Verify streaming continues but scroll stays where user left it
Step 5: Scroll to bottom to re-enable auto-scroll

description: Message timestamps are stored and shown in conversation view
steps: Step 1: Send multiple messages with time gaps
Step 2: View the conversation
Step 3: Verify timestamps are shown on messages
Step 4: Verify timestamps are accurate relative times
Step 5: Hover to see absolute timestamps
